user_reviews.Description: This place is a hidden gem! The owner is very kind and hospitable. We have been all day walking and arrived very hungry, he made us a delicious meal and made us feel very welcome. It is a place to visit when you are in Yazd.

We were satisfied with the quality of their breakfast (they only have Nimro and omelets and the like) and the quality of their cafe's space and tea.

user_reviews.Name: selin petrosian
user_reviews.Description: فضلی کوچیک و جالبی داره، فقط اگر مثل من با بوی سیگار مشکل دارید حواستون باشه که در فضای داخل هم بقیه میتونن سیگار بکشن، سفارش ما اسپرسو و قهوه ترک بود که هر رو خوب بودن، فقط یکم زیادی طول کشید تا سفارش آماده بشه 😅

user_reviews.text_translated: It's a small and interesting place, just be aware that if you have a problem with the smell of cigarettes like me, others can smoke inside. We ordered espresso and Turkish coffee, both of which were good, it just took a little while for the order to be ready 😅

user_reviews.Name: Aladdin Hosseini
user_reviews.Description:
کافه علاء؛ برکه‌ای‌ست آرام و بی‌پروا، خارج از تلاطم‌های سترگ و بیدادگر وسعت آبی‌ اقیانوس‌ دلواپسی‌ها و بیرون از مدار طنین ممتد سایش آرواره‌‌های موریانه‌ی عمر.
کافه علاء؛ گوشه‌ای‌ست دنج و بی‌هیاهو، به دور از همهمه‌ی پژواک سهمگین آبشار زندگی و دغدغه‌ی سکوت مرگبار کوچه پس کوچه‌های گذار هستی.
کافه علاء؛ روزنه‌‌ی امیدی‌ست برای ققنوس شدن و دریچه‌ای‌‌ برای پرگشودن از عمق خاکستر تیره‌ی رذالت‌ها به اوج بیکران محبت‌ها و پروازی‌ست جانفزا در سپهر روشن صداقت‌ها.
کافه علاء؛ قطعه‌ای‌ست از بهشت و پردیسی بی‌آلایش در گستره‌ی خارزار روزگار، زورقی ساده ولی سرشار از امید چونان اشتیاقی عمیق در امتداد دیده‌ی براق نگاه کودکی از سر ذوق.
خلاصه‌ی کلام؛ بهای کافه‌ی ما، کلام انسانیت است و گفتگویی گرم از سر مهربانی ولو به کوتاهی یک لبخند.
به دنیای کوچک ما خوش آمدید.

user_reviews.text_translated:
Alaa Cafe; is a calm and carefree pond, outside the vast and unjust turbulence of the blue ocean of worries and outside the orbit of the continuous resonance of the termite jaws of life.
Alaa Cafe; is a cozy and quiet corner, far from the roar of the fierce echo of the waterfall of life and the concern of the deadly silence of the back alleys of the transitory alleys of existence.
Alaa Cafe; is a window of hope for becoming a phoenix and a window for soaring from the depths of the dark ash of vices to the infinite peak of love and a soul-stirring flight in the bright sphere of honesty.
Alaa Cafe; is a piece of paradise and an unspoiled campus in the thorny expanse of time, a simple boat but full of hope like a deep longing along the shiny eye of a child's gaze from the depths of delight.
Summary; The price of our cafe is the word of humanity and a warm conversation out of kindness, even if it is short, a smile.
Welcome to our little world.

title: قهوه پهلوان یزدی
address: Yazd Province, Yazd, Yazd, ' St, W929+CM7 قهوه پهلوان یزدی, Iran

user_reviews.Name: Ali Khateri
user_reviews.Description:
One of the oldest and most authentic coffee spots in Yazd, this place offers a unique blend of tradition and flavor! What makes it truly special is the addition of natural flavorings like sugarcane, rose water, and cardamom. These ingredients create an unforgettable, aromatic twist to the coffee, unlike anything you’ve tasted before.

If you're planning to explore the traditional market or walk through the charming old streets of Yazd, starting your journey with a cup of coffee here is a must! It perfectly sets the mood for a day of discovering the rich history and culture of this beautiful city.

user_reviews.Name: mo a
user_reviews.Description: Yazdi or Iranian coffee is similar to Turkish and Arabic coffee;  But over the years, by adding some traditional flavorings, it has been adapted to the taste of Yazdis and has taken a special place in Yazdi culture and customs.  it is arrived.  This coffee is made with roasted coffee powder, water and natural flavorings such as sugarcane, rose water and cardamom and has a different and attractive taste.  The environment of this small and portable shop has a rich and rich history and gives you a beautiful atmosphere.  You can enjoy the coffee inside the shop or outside the shop or even take it with you to another place.  The taste was wonderful.

This coffee is made with roasted coffee powder, water and natural flavorings such as sugarcane, rose water and cardamom and has a different and attractive taste. You can enjoy the coffee inside the shop or outside the shop or even take it with you to another place.  The taste was wonderful.

user_reviews.Name: Alireza Hoshmand
user_reviews.Description:
Yazdi coffee, dating back to the Qajar era, is listed as an intangible cultural heritage of Iran. This unique coffee is made with roasted coffee powder, water, and natural flavorings such as rock candy, rosewater, and cardamom, giving it a distinct and appealing taste.

Similar to Turkish and Arabic coffee, Yazdi or Iranian coffee has been adapted over the years with traditional flavorings to suit the local taste of Yazd. It holds a special place in Yazdi culture and traditions. This warm beverage is typically served during religious ceremonies, especially in the month of Muharram and mourning rituals, often accompanied by Yazdi cake. Due to this association, many people refer to it as mourning coffee. Brewing Yazdi coffee takes about six hours, so you need to be patient if you want to prepare it at home.

This is a great and fun place. Near the Jameh Mosque, you can enjoy the best Yazdi coffee.

Similar to Turkish and Arabic coffee, Yazdi or Iranian coffee has been adapted over the years with traditional flavorings to suit the local taste of Yazd. It holds a special place in Yazdi culture and traditions. This warm beverage is typically served during religious ceremonies, especially in the month of Muharram and mourning rituals, often accompanied by Yazdi cake. Due to this association, many people refer to it as mourning coffee. Brewing Yazdi coffee takes about six hours, so you need to be patient if you want to prepare it at home.

This is a great and fun place. Near the Jameh Mosque, you can enjoy the best Yazdi coffee.

user_reviews.Name: Wandering Trotters
user_reviews.Description:
The best coffee in Yazd. The Yazdi coffee is delicious. The coffee shop is small but very cozy and picturesque.
In addition to being inexpensive they offer a traditional Yazd sweet with your coffee. A good place to take a break in your tour of the city because the decor fully immerses you in the Iranian culture.
If you want to take some of this delicious flavor home, they have coffee powder and you can even take it prepared in a bottle

user_reviews.Name: Farhad فرهاد Mortaz مرتاض
user_reviews.Description:
اولین تجربه من در این کافه خیلی خوشایند نبود. اول چیز ظاهر و فضای غربی کافه همراه با موزیک بلند راک همراه با یخچالهایی که خودت باید می رفتی از توش دسری که میخواستی برمیداشتی که در نوع خودش در شهر یزد بدیع و تازه بود. اما درباره سرویس این کافه! اول اینکه دو تا دسر برداشتیم و گذاشتیم روی میزی که نشسته بودیم، و قبل اینکه خودمون بگیم چی برداشتیم خودشون دم صندوق فورا گفتند شما این و‌ اون را برداشتید! نشستیم که دسر را بخوریم، درخواست بشقاب کردیم گفتند نداریم! به جاش یک سینی چوبی کوچک دادند! مزه دسرها (کیک سه شیر شکلاتی و چیز کیک لوتوس) خوب بود. برای نوشیدنی از روی منو ماچالاته سفارش دادم که گفتند نداریم، بعد شیک پروتئین ویتامین خواستم که گفتند بروید از یخچال خودتون بردارید و بیارید ما با شیر شیک درست کنیم ازش براتون! نوشیدنی قهوه لاته قهوه داغ نبود اما‌ چایی ماسالا خوب بود. فضا و اتمسفر در کل دلپذیر بود.

first experience at this café wasn’t very pleasant. To start with, the Western décor and atmosphere, accompanied by loud rock music and self-serve fridges for desserts, felt fresh and unique in Yazd. But as for the service! We picked out two desserts and set them on our table, and before we could even tell the cashier what we had chosen, they instantly named them for us. When we sat down to eat, we asked for plates, and they told us they didn’t have any! Instead, they handed us a small wooden tray. The desserts (chocolate tres leches cake and Lotus cheesecake) tasted good. I ordered a matcha latte from the menu, but they said they didn’t have it. Then I asked for a protein shake with vitamins, and they told me to grab it from the fridge myself, and they’d make it with milk for me! The coffee latte wasn’t hot, but the masala chai was good. Overall, the atmosphere was pleasant.
user_reviews.text_original:
اولین تجربه من در این کافه خیلی خوشایند نبود. اول چیز ظاهر و فضای غربی کافه همراه با موزیک بلند راک همراه با یخچالهایی که خودت باید می رفتی از توش دسری که میخواستی برمیداشتی که در نوع خودش در شهر یزد بدیع و تازه بود. اما درباره سرویس این کافه! اول اینکه دو تا دسر برداشتیم و گذاشتیم روی میزی که نشسته بودیم، و قبل اینکه خودمون بگیم چی برداشتیم خودشون دم صندوق فورا گفتند شما این و‌ اون را برداشتید! نشستیم که دسر را بخوریم، درخواست بشقاب کردیم گفتند نداریم! به جاش یک سینی چوبی کوچک دادند! مزه دسرها (کیک سه شیر شکلاتی و چیز کیک لوتوس) خوب بود. برای نوشیدنی از روی منو ماچالاته سفارش دادم که گفتند نداریم، بعد شیک پروتئین ویتامین خواستم که گفتند بروید از یخچال خودتون بردارید و بیارید ما با شیر شیک درست کنیم ازش براتون! نوشیدنی قهوه لاته قهوه داغ نبود اما‌ چایی ماسالا خوب بود. فضا و اتمسفر در کل دلپذیر بود.

first experience at this café wasn’t very pleasant. To start with, the Western décor and atmosphere, accompanied by loud rock music and self-serve fridges for desserts, felt fresh and unique in Yazd. But as for the service! We picked out two desserts and set them on our table, and before we could even tell the cashier what we had chosen, they instantly named them for us. When we sat down to eat, we asked for plates, and they told us they didn’t have any! Instead, they handed us a small wooden tray. The desserts (chocolate tres leches cake and Lotus cheesecake) tasted good. I ordered a matcha latte from the menu, but they said they didn’t have it. Then I asked for a protein shake with vitamins, and they told me to grab it from the fridge myself, and they’d make it with milk for me! The coffee latte wasn’t hot, but the masala chai was good. Overall, the atmosphere was pleasant.
user_reviews.text_translated:
My first experience at this cafe was not very pleasant. First of all, the western appearance and atmosphere of the cafe, along with loud rock music, and refrigerators that you had to go to and pick out the dessert you wanted, which was unique and new in its kind in the city of Yazd. But about the service of this cafe! First, we picked up two desserts and placed them on the table where we were sitting, and before we could say what we picked up, they immediately said at the cash register that you picked up this and that! We sat down to eat the dessert, asked for a plate, and they said they didn’t have any! Instead, they gave us a small wooden tray! The desserts (chocolate three-milk cake and lotus cheesecake) tasted good. For drinks, I ordered a macalata from the menu, which they said they didn’t have, then I asked for a protein vitamin shake, which they said go get it from your fridge and bring it to us, and we’ll make it for you with milk! The latte coffee drink wasn’t hot, but the masala tea was good. The atmosphere and atmosphere in general was pleasant.

user_reviews.Name: Negin Mozhdepour
user_reviews.Description: خیلی منو متنوعی داشت فضای بسیار عالی بود و کافی های خیلی خوبی داشت
user_reviews.text_original: خیلی منو متنوعی داشت فضای بسیار عالی بود و کافی های خیلی خوبی داشت
user_reviews.text_translated: It had a very varied menu, a great atmosphere, and very good coffee.

user_reviews.Name: F Khoshnoodi
user_reviews.Description: چیدن خوراکی ها از جمله کیک ها، آب میوه ها و نوشیدنی های سرد در کافه به صورت بسته بندی شده و به سبک فروشگاهی بسیار جالب بود. تنوع نوع قهوهایی که سرو میشد از نظر درصد ترکیب عریبکا و روبوستا هم در نوع خود کم نظیر و در نهایت سپری کردن زمانی در این کافه، تجربه بسیار لذت بخشی بود.
user_reviews.text_original: چیدن خوراکی ها از جمله کیک ها، آب میوه ها و نوشیدنی های سرد در کافه به صورت بسته بندی شده و به سبک فروشگاهی بسیار جالب بود. تنوع نوع قهوهایی که سرو میشد از نظر درصد ترکیب عریبکا و روبوستا هم در نوع خود کم نظیر و در نهایت سپری کردن زمانی در این کافه، تجربه بسیار لذت بخشی بود.
user_reviews.text_translated: It was very interesting to pick up the food items, including cakes, juices, and cold drinks, packaged in a store-style cafe. The variety of coffees served was also unique in terms of the percentage of Arabica and Robusta blends, and ultimately, spending time in this cafe was a very enjoyable experience.

user_reviews.Name: Uta Lörzer
user_reviews.Description: Walking from our hotel to the historical centre (and back in the evening) we passed by thiy coffee shop and had an Espresso every time. The coffee is very tasty, the owner very friendly, we always had a great time there.

user_reviews.Description: I was looking for a coffee in Yazd for a while and this place was pretty good. It's super small but capable barista.

user_reviews.Name: Saeed Ghorbani
user_reviews.Description: Hello, I hope you're doing well. The coffee-man is a really good guy and has a respectful behavior. I highly advise 30-70 mixed coffee, in this coffee shop. Prices are affordable.
user_reviews.text_original: Hello, I hope you're doing well. The coffee-man is a really good guy and has a respectful behavior. I highly advise 30-70 mixed coffee, in this coffee shop. Prices are affordable.

user_reviews.Name: Sera
user_reviews.Description: Delicious iced latte and friendly service. However, we were not shown a menu or prices before ordering and had a bad surprise when we got the bill. Each iced latte costed 750.000 riels, which was way more than we could afford. It would be better to be able to consult the prices before ordering.
user_reviews.text_original: Delicious iced latte and friendly service. However, we were not shown a menu or prices before ordering and had a bad surprise when we got the bill. Each iced latte costed 750.000 riels, which was way more than we could afford. It would be better to be able to consult the prices before ordering.

user_reviews.Name: Luc
user_reviews.Description: Tried coffees in different places around the old city but this one serves definitely the best espresso / cappuccino (incl late art) / iced coffee and fresh juice! Have a coffee here around 19.00 while sitting outside on one of the benches!
